--- a/handlers.py
+++ b/handlers.py
@@ -10,7 +10,5 @@
 class FileHandler(BaseHandler):
     def get(self, path):
-        safe_path = os.path.normpath(os.path.join(BASE_DIR, path))
-        if not safe_path.startswith(BASE_DIR):
-            raise HTTPError(403)
+        safe_path = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, path)

gold_annotations.issue: Path traversal: removed normpath + prefix check allows ../../etc/passwd access.
